sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113383" key="xariento/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰριεντ-ότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gracefulness of manner, playfulness,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.441b</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
